title: Kurtzy 2 Inch/5.08cm Chip Paint Brushes (24 Pack) - Professional Wooden Handle Paintbrush Set for Paint, Stains, Varnishes, Glues and Home DIY
features: WOODEN CHIP BRUSHES: Included in our set are 24 wooden paint brushes. They are 20cm (7.87 inches) in length and 5.08cm (2 inches) in width. The handles are made from poplar wood. As there are lots of brushes in this set, they can be used once and thrown away if you are using non water based paints, glue or materials that are hard to clean. If you are using these for water based paints, they can easily be washed out and used again.

COMFORTABLE HANDLES: Our paint brushes are specifically shaped to the shape and size of your hand so you can paint with ease and accuracy. The handles have been sanded smooth so they will not splinter. They are lightweight which make them comfortable to use for long painting projects.

DURABLE BRISTLES: The bristles are held in tight with tin ferrules so you distribute paint evenly. As they are 2 inches wide and have packed firm bristles, they are ideal for cutting in. The bristles give a smooth finish to your painting and are a great addition to your home or work DIY supplies.

MULTI PURPOSE BRUSHES: Our paint brushes can be used for a whole range of different paints such as emulsion, chalk, prime, top coat, gloss, water based, metal, acrylic, poster, watercolour, satin, oil, wood and gesso paints. They can also be used for epoxy resin, glues, stains and varnishes. Use them to paint rooms such as bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens and bathrooms. You can also paint furniture with them or use them for arts and crafts.

MONEY BACK : All paint brush sets that are sold come with a 100% money back just in case you are not happy with your purchase. If that is the case, please get in contact with us and we shall refund you. It's so simple!
